meaning: n.麝香鹿,能发出麝香的各种各样的植物
examples: The super-rich Richard Branson, Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk are all pouring money into developing business space flying machines.
Musk is a guy who gets things done.
Professor Goel has a much rosier outlook on the future of artificial intelligence than, say, Elon Musk, Stephen Hawking, Bill Gates or Steve Wozniak.
Whether Musk was influenced by Jonas explicitly or not, what happened next was profound.
Musk said he expects at least half of Tesla customers to take the lease option.
